content: agent2: implementing lightness_factor param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py (post-quantization palette brightness adjustment) + Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch quantize() method only, should be low overlap risk unless you're also touching quantize().

agent2: added lightness_factor=1.0 as new last param to quantize() (after dither), plus a module-level helper _adjust_palette_lightness(palette, lightness_factor) placed just above 'class Image:' in src/PIL/Image.py. Applied in both the palette= branch and the normal quantize branch, right before returning. If you're adding sort_palette to the same signature/body, please add it after my lightness_factor param and apply sorting logic separately from my helper to avoid clobbering. My current git diff only shows my own changes so we seem to be in separate working copies, but flagging just in case we share state.
